Bug / Task Description: The DeadLetterQueue.can_requeue method treats max_retries=0 as if it meant unlimited retries. When a task is added to the dead letter queue with max_retries=0 (meaning it must never be requeued), the queue wrongly returns True from can_requeue and the task is requeued indefinitely. Fix the method so that max_retries=0 means no requeue is allowed, while max_retries=None continues to mean unlimited retries.
Commit Subject: fix(deadletter): treat max_retries=0 as no-retry instead of unlimited
